    • Workflow Wrappers

Oscillation score with surrogate log-Z

Source: R/workflow_wrappers.R
oscillation_score_z.Rd

Computes the oscillation score, generates a surrogate distribution, and returns the log-Z score: $$Z = (log(O) - mean(log(O_{rep}))) / sd(log(O_{rep}))$$.

Usage

oscillation_score_z(
  signal,
  fs,
  flim,
  nrep = 500,
  alpha = 0.05,
  keep_trend = FALSE,
  trend_dist = c("gamma"),
  trend_ddt = NULL,
  trend_alpha = 0.05,
  surrogate_method = c("auto", "event_shuffle", "event_trend", "phase_randomized"),
  signal_mode = c("auto", "event", "continuous"),
  fcor = FALSE,
  taper = c("none", "hann", "hanning"),
  ci_nboot = 0,
  ci_level = 0.95,
  tidy = FALSE,
  ...
)

oscore_z(...)

Arguments

signal

numeric vector (binary or continuous).

fs

sampling rate in Hz.

flim

length-2 numeric vector c(fmin, fmax) in Hz.

nrep

number of surrogates.

alpha

significance level for one-tailed Z-thresholding.

keep_trend, trend_dist, trend_ddt, trend_alpha

passed to surrogates.

surrogate_method, signal_mode

passed to oscillation_score_surrogates.

fcor

logical; apply 1/f correction.

taper

taper before FFT.

ci_nboot

number of bootstrap draws for the log-Z confidence interval. Set to 0 to skip CI estimation.

ci_level

confidence level for bootstrap CI.

tidy

logical; if TRUE return a one-row data.frame.

...

further arguments passed to oscillation_score.

Value

list (default) or data.frame if tidy=TRUE.
